Trusted Phoenix HVAC Experts

Phoenix's Trusted HVAC Experts

Keeping your home comfortable year-round in the Valley's extreme heat. Family-owned and serving the Phoenix metro since 2012.

Family Owned & Operated Industry Certified 16+ Years of Experience 5.0 Rating
5.0 5.0 A+
Verified Reviews

Get a Free Estimate

What Your Neighbors Have to Say

Read More Reviews →
M
Megan T.

Our AC died during that brutal June heatwave last year. Apex had a technician to our Ahwatukee home in under 90 minutes. He diagnosed a failed capacitor and had us cooling again before dinner. No upselling, just honest service when we needed it most.

C
Carlos R.

After getting three quotes for replacing our 20-year-old unit, Apex stood out for their knowledge of Phoenix-specific needs. They recommended a slightly smaller, more efficient unit than others suggested - and it's cooled our 1970s block home better than the old oversized one ever did. The install team was meticulous cleaning up after.

S
Susan K.

I've lived in Arcadia for 15 years and never had my ducts cleaned until Apex recommended it. The difference is incredible - no more dust settling everywhere within hours of cleaning. They found several leaks in our ductwork too. My allergies have improved dramatically since they did the work.

J
James L.

The Ecobee thermostat Apex installed has already paid for itself in energy savings. They programmed it perfectly for our schedule and SRP's time-of-use rates. When we went on vacation last summer, being able to adjust the temp remotely prevented coming home to a sauna. Excellent service from quote to installation.

Additional HVAC Services

AC Installation HVAC Maintenance Duct Cleaning Emergency Repairs

Apex Hvac — Certified Professionals

Our team brings certified expertise and years of experience to every hvac project. We stand behind our work with comprehensive warranties and a commitment to quality.

More About Us →

The Apex Hvac Way

Our proven process ensures every project is completed with precision, transparency, and care.

1

Consultation

We start with a thorough, no-obligation assessment. Our certified team evaluates your needs and provides a detailed report with recommendations.

2

Plan & Prepare

We work with you to determine the best approach for your specific hvac needs. Our experts ensure the right plan for quality results.

3

Get It Done

Our skilled team gets to work with precision and efficiency. We maintain a clean, organized environment and keep you informed every step of the way.

4

Quality Check

Before we consider any job complete, our team performs a comprehensive quality review. We verify every detail meets our exacting standards.

5

Wrap Up

Transparent pricing with no surprises. You only pay when you're 100% satisfied with the work. We offer flexible options to make the process seamless.

Proudly Serving Phoenix & Beyond

As a locally owned and operated company, we're proud to serve customers throughout Phoenix, AZ and the surrounding communities. Our team brings local expertise and dedication to every project.

Scottsdale Mesa Chandler Gilbert Tempe Phoenix Glendale Peoria
Let's Get Started →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our hvac services.

How long does a new AC installation take?

Most residential installations are completed in 6-8 hours. We work efficiently to minimize your time without AC, especially during hot months.

What size unit do I need for my Phoenix home?

Square footage is just one factor - we also consider insulation, window types, and shade coverage. Oversized units actually perform worse in our climate.

Do you offer financing for new AC systems?

Yes, we partner with several lenders offering low-interest options with approved credit. Many homeowners qualify for 0% APR for 12-24 months.

Built on Phoenix Values

Schedule your pre-summer tune-up today and avoid breakdowns during peak season.

Let's Begin →
